시편 26:1.content: Judge me, Yahweh, for I have walked in my integrity. I have trusted also in Yahweh without wavering.

시편 26:2.content: Examine me, Yahweh, and prove me. Try my heart and my mind.

시편 26:3.content: For your loving kindness is before my eyes. I have walked in your truth.

시편 26:4.content: I have not sat with deceitful men, neither will I go in with hypocrites.

시편 26:5.content: I hate the assembly of evildoers, and will not sit with the wicked.

시편 26:6.content: I will wash my hands in innocence, so I will go about your altar, Yahweh,

시편 26:7.content: that I may make the voice of thanksgiving to be heard and tell of all your wondrous deeds.

시편 26:8.content: Yahweh, I love the habitation of your house, the place where your glory dwells.

시편 26:9.content: Don’t gather my soul with sinners, nor my life with bloodthirsty men;

시편 26:10.content: in whose hands is wickedness, their right hand is full of bribes.

시편 26:11.content: But as for me, I will walk in my integrity. Redeem me, and be merciful to me.

시편 26:12.content: My foot stands in an even place. In the congregations I will bless Yahweh.
